title: Scary Optimized
description:
This modpack improve performance and
accesible with the latest of all mc releases!
body:
this modpack was designd just for **low-end pc's** nor **work laptops**!
mainly focusing on _lightweight, optimization, and less mods!_

**what it contains**

this modpack only contains 11 mods, and if you find issues on this modpack, Join the discord server!

**what loader does it use**

it uses fabric loader, and added fabric API in order for all mods to work!

**Q&A**

Q: Is this modpack ALWAYS up to date?

A: sadly, **no**. because i have school and other stuff such as my channel to work with!


hope you enjoy!
